__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Socrates' Poison,Chinchorro Mummy,Edict of Milan,Keyhole Satellite,Peacock Suit,Galileo's Ball
|rank=purple
|amount=6
|category=self
|description=Per 500 DNA Strength, Snail ATK +4<br>DNA Strength: 25,000/25,000
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by DNA Strength]]
